title: Doodle Product Miniature Ad AI
sourceTitle: Doodle Product Miniature Ad AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Creative composite brand advertisement built around oversized fictional fried-chicken bucket with clean invented CRISPY CLUB branding, tiny doodle workers climbing ladders, carrying herbs and warm spices, building flags, and surfing on sauce around the bucket, and CRISPY LITTLE WORLD. Subject: oversized fictional fried-chicken bucket with clean invented CRISPY CLUB branding is the central real-life photographed hero object, sharply focused and seamlessly integrated with miniature black-ink doodle activity. Scene: tiny doodle workers climbing ladders, carrying herbs and warm spices, building flags, and surfing on sauce around the bucket turns the product into a playful miniature doodle universe while preserving a clean white studio background and premium commercial restraint. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 minimalist composition with the giant product centered, generous negative space, doodles wrapping around the product, headline at the top, and clean modern campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: cute tiny puffy cartoon creatures with rounded bodies, small arms, tiny legs, and simple playful expressions and floating hearts, arrows, steam doodles, aroma swirls, sparkles, stars, confetti, and small speech bubbles climb, build, celebrate, explore, take selfies, and interact naturally with the product like tiny adventurers. Style: Premium studio product photography blended with simple expressive black ink notebook doodles, charming line art, tiny puffy cartoon creatures, sharp focus, and high-end composite advertising finish. Color Palette: Fixed clean white background, black ink doodle lines, subtle studio shadows, restrained product color, and small playful accent marks without clutter. Lighting: Premium studio lighting with soft shadows, crisp product edges, gentle floor contact, and clear separation between real product photography and hand-drawn doodles. Camera: Straight-on commercial product view, centered hero scale, sharp product detail, readable headline, and 3:4 vertical crop. Typography: CRISPY LITTLE WORLD appears as large bold modern sans-serif headline text near the top; small handwritten doodle notes can appear as secondary decorative marks only. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Doodle Product Miniature Ad Crispy Little World

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Creative composite brand advertisement built around giant matcha cream dessert cup with invented MOKA CLOUD label, tiny doodle creatures building wafer bridges, relaxing on ice cubes, taking selfies, and carrying strawberries around the cup, and SWEET CITY IN A CUP. Subject: giant matcha cream dessert cup with invented MOKA CLOUD label is the central real-life photographed hero object, sharply focused and seamlessly integrated with miniature black-ink doodle activity. Scene: tiny doodle creatures building wafer bridges, relaxing on ice cubes, taking selfies, and carrying strawberries around the cup turns the product into a playful miniature doodle universe while preserving a clean white studio background and premium commercial restraint. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 minimalist composition with the giant product centered, generous negative space, doodles wrapping around the product, headline at the top, and clean modern campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: round puffy cartoon explorers with tiny arms, tiny legs, cute faces, and playful notebook-sketch personalities and motion lines, sparkles, stars, handwritten arrows, steam swirls, floating hearts, and tiny speech bubbles climb, build, celebrate, explore, take selfies, and interact naturally with the product like tiny adventurers. Style: Premium studio product photography blended with simple expressive black ink notebook doodles, charming line art, tiny puffy cartoon creatures, sharp focus, and high-end composite advertising finish. Color Palette: Fixed clean white background, black ink doodle lines, subtle studio shadows, restrained product color, and small playful accent marks without clutter. Lighting: Premium studio lighting with soft shadows, crisp product edges, gentle floor contact, and clear separation between real product photography and hand-drawn doodles. Camera: Straight-on commercial product view, centered hero scale, sharp product detail, readable headline, and 3:4 vertical crop. Typography: SWEET CITY IN A CUP appears as large bold modern sans-serif headline text near the top; small handwritten doodle notes can appear as secondary decorative marks only. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
